ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: View the complete plugin documentation and guides
ast.target: 查看完整的插件文档和指南

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the model provider. Gemini uses the Google cloud API. Ollama runs models locally on your machine; install from https://ollama.com and pull a model with `ollama pull <name>`.
ast.target: 选择模型提供商。Gemini 使用 Google 云 API。Ollama 在您的机器上本地运行模型；请从 https://ollama.com 安装，并使用 `ollama pull <name>` 拉取模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: HTTP endpoint of your local Ollama daemon. Default is http://localhost:11434.
ast.target: 本地 Ollama 守护进程的 HTTP 端点。默认为 http://localhost:11434。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-query the Ollama daemon for available models.
ast.target: 重新查询 Ollama 守护进程以获取可用模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Google Search, URL Context (web fetch), Deep Research, image generation, and RAG indexing are unavailable when using Ollama. They rely on Gemini built-in services.
ast.target: 使用 Ollama 时，Google 搜索、URL 上下文（网页抓取）、深度研究、图像生成和 RAG 索引功能不可用。这些功能依赖于 Gemini 的内置服务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Link your Google Gemini API key. Click "Link..." and Obsidian will ask for a Secret Name (this is just a label — use any name like "gemini-api") and a Secret Value (paste your API key here). Get a key free at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey
ast.target: 链接您的 Google Gemini API 密钥。点击“链接...”，Obsidian 会要求输入一个密钥名称（这只是一个标签——可以使用任何名称，如“gemini-api”）和一个密钥值（在此处粘贴您的 API 密钥）。可在 https://aistudio.google.com/apikey 免费获取密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder where plugin data is stored. Agent sessions live under Agent-Sessions/, custom prompts under Prompts/, hooks under Hooks/, scheduled task state under Scheduled-Tasks/.
ast.target: 存储插件数据的文件夹。代理会话位于 Agent-Sessions/ 下，自定义提示词位于 Prompts/ 下，钩子位于 Hooks/ 下，计划任务状态位于 Scheduled-Tasks/ 下。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reveal advanced sections (Custom Prompts, API Configuration, Tool Permissions, Tool Loop Detection, MCP Servers, Debug) for power users.
ast.target: 为高级用户显示高级部分（自定义提示词、API 配置、工具权限、工具循环检测、MCP 服务器、调试）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your name used in system instructions so the AI can address you personally in conversations.
ast.target: 您的姓名，用于系统指令中，以便 AI 在对话中能以个人方式称呼您。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter property name where summaries are stored when using "Summarize Active File" command.
ast.target: 使用“总结活动文件”命令时，存储摘要的 Frontmatter 属性名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stream AI responses word-by-word as they are generated for a more interactive chat experience.
ast.target: 在 AI 响应生成时逐词流式传输，以获得更具互动性的聊天体验。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically open a diff view when the agent proposes file changes, instead of requiring a button click.
ast.target: 当代理提出文件更改时，自动打开差异视图，而不是需要点击按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Persist agent chat sessions as markdown files in your vault. Sessions are saved under Agent-Sessions/ with auto-generated titles.
ast.target: 将代理聊天会话作为 Markdown 文件持久化到您的保险库中。会话保存在 Agent-Sessions/ 下，标题自动生成。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Append a summary of each tool execution to the session history file for auditing. Requires Session History to be enabled. Requires plugin reload to take effect.
ast.target: 将每次工具执行的摘要附加到会话历史文件中，用于审计。需要启用会话历史。需要重新加载插件才能生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Lowercase identifier used as the filename and in output paths. Cannot be changed after creation.
ast.target: 用作文件名和输出路径的小写标识符。创建后无法更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often the task should run.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The instruction sent to the AI on each run. Supports the same markdown you would use in the agent chat.
ast.target: 每次运行时发送给 AI 的指令。支持与代理聊天中相同的 Markdown 格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the plugin chat model for this task (e.g. gemini-2.0-flash). Leave blank to use the default.
ast.target: 为此任务覆盖插件聊天模型（例如 gemini-2.0-flash）。留空则使用默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When Obsidian was closed and this task was due, show it in the catch-up approval modal on next startup.
ast.target: 当 Obsidian 关闭且此任务到期时，在下次启动时在补发审批模态框中显示它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disable to pause the task without deleting it.
ast.target: 禁用以暂停任务而不删除它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The vault event that fires this hook.
ast.target: 触发此钩子的保险库事件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What this hook does on each fire.
ast.target: 此钩子每次触发时执行的操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Limit fires to paths matching this glob. Examples: Daily/**/*.md, Notes/*.md. Leave blank for any path.
ast.target: 将触发限制在匹配此 glob 的路径上。示例：Daily/**/*.md、Notes/*.md。留空表示任何路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command palette id to fire. Examples: editor:save-file, gemini-scribe-summarize-active-file. View Command IDs via Settings → Hotkeys (open the developer console with Ctrl+Shift+I to inspect ids).
ast.target: 要触发的命令面板 ID。示例：editor:save-file、gemini-scribe-summarize-active-file。通过设置 → 快捷键查看命令 ID（使用 Ctrl+Shift+I 打开开发者控制台以检查 ID）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When on, the triggering file is opened in the workspace before the command runs — useful for editor-scoped commands. When off, the command runs against whatever file is currently active. Default off.
ast.target: 开启时，在命令运行前在工作区中打开触发文件——适用于编辑器作用域的命令。关闭时，命令针对当前活动的文件运行。默认关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Instruction sent to the AI on each fire. Available variables: {{filePath}}, {{fileName}}, {{trigger}}, {{oldPath}}.
ast.target: 每次触发时发送给 AI 的指令。可用变量：{{filePath}}、{{fileName}}、{{trigger}}、{{oldPath}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sliding-window cap across all files. 0 (default) means unlimited.
ast.target: 跨所有文件的滑动窗口上限。0（默认）表示无限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Slugs of skills to pre-activate. Empty = inherit all available skills.
ast.target: 要预激活的技能标识符。空值 = 继承所有可用技能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the plugin chat model for this hook. Leave blank to use the default.
ast.target: 为此钩子覆盖插件聊天模型。留空则使用默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to write the agent response. Supports {slug}, {date}, {fileName}. Leave blank to skip writing a file.
ast.target: 写入代理响应的位置。支持 {slug}、{date}、{fileName}。留空则跳过写入文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip this hook on mobile platforms. Headless agent runs can be heavy on phones.
ast.target: 在移动平台上跳过此钩子。无头代理运行在手机上可能很耗资源。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disable to pause the hook without deleting it.
ast.target: 禁用以暂停钩子而不删除它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create, edit, enable/disable, and delete scheduled AI tasks. Tasks run automatically in the background while Obsidian is open.
ast.target: 创建、编辑、启用/禁用和删除计划 AI 任务。任务在 Obsidian 打开时自动在后台运行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, tasks that were missed while Obsidian was closed (and have "Run if missed" set) are submitted automatically on startup without showing the approval modal.
ast.target: 启用后，在 Obsidian 关闭期间错过的任务（且设置了“错过时运行”）将在启动时自动提交，而不显示审批模态框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Subscribe to vault events and run AI agent tasks in response. Off by default — vault events fire continuously, and a broadly-scoped hook can drain API quota quickly.
ast.target: 订阅保险库事件并运行 AI 代理任务作为响应。默认关闭——保险库事件持续触发，作用域广泛的钩子可能会快速消耗 API 配额。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create, edit, enable/disable, and delete hooks. Each hook fires when a matching vault event occurs and runs as a headless agent session.
ast.target: 创建、编辑、启用/禁用和删除钩子。每个钩子在匹配的保险库事件发生时触发，并作为无头代理会话运行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: WARNING: Allows custom prompts to completely replace the system prompt. This may break expected functionality.
ast.target: 警告：允许自定义提示词完全替换系统提示词。这可能会破坏预期功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write log entries to a file in the plugin state folder. Errors and warnings are always logged; debug entries require Debug Mode. Log files are automatically rotated at 1 MB.
ast.target: 将日志条目写入插件状态文件夹中的文件。错误和警告始终记录；调试条目需要调试模式。日志文件在 1 MB 时自动轮换。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the default Google API base URL (e.g. for a corporate proxy or local gateway). Leave blank to use the official endpoint.
ast.target: 覆盖默认的 Google API 基础 URL（例如用于公司代理或本地网关）。留空则使用官方端点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of retries when a model request fails.
ast.target: 模型请求失败时的最大重试次数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Initial delay in milliseconds before the first retry. Subsequent retries will use exponential backoff.
ast.target: 第一次重试前的初始延迟（毫秒）。后续重试将使用指数退避。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prevent the AI from repeatedly calling the same tool with identical parameters.
ast.target: 防止 AI 使用相同参数重复调用同一工具。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of identical tool calls before considering it a loop (default: 3).
ast.target: 在认为是循环之前，相同工具调用的次数（默认：3）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Time window to check for repeated calls (default: 30 seconds).
ast.target: 检查重复调用的时间窗口（默认：30 秒）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tool permissions will appear here once tools are loaded.
ast.target: 工具加载后，工具权限将显示在此处。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a preset that determines default permissions for all tools.
ast.target: 选择一个预设，确定所有工具的默认权限。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A unique, friendly name for this server
ast.target: 此服务器的唯一友好名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to connect to the server: local process (stdio) or remote URL (HTTP)
ast.target: 如何连接到服务器：本地进程（stdio）或远程 URL（HTTP）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The HTTP endpoint of the MCP server
ast.target: MCP 服务器的 HTTP 端点

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 服务器已存储 OAuth 令牌

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The command to spawn the MCP server process
ast.target: 启动 MCP 服务器进程的命令

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line. Values are stored in your OS keychain, not in plaintext.
ast.target: 可选的 KEY=VALUE 对，每行一个。值存储在您的操作系统密钥链中，而非明文。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Connect to this server when the plugin loads
ast.target: 插件加载时连接到此服务器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Connect temporarily to discover available tools
ast.target: 临时连接以发现可用工具

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Connect to Model Context Protocol servers to extend the agent with external tools. Supports local (stdio) and remote (HTTP) servers.
ast.target: 连接到模型上下文协议服务器，以使用外部工具扩展代理。支持本地（stdio）和远程（HTTP）服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Index your vault files for semantic search using Google File Search.
ast.target: 使用 Google 文件搜索为您的保险库文件建立索引以进行语义搜索。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically update the index when files are created, modified, or deleted.
ast.target: 当文件创建、修改或删除时自动更新索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Index PDFs and other supported file types in addition to markdown notes. Requires reindexing.
ast.target: 除 Markdown 笔记外，还索引 PDF 和其他支持的文件类型。需要重新索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable debug logging to the console. Useful for troubleshooting.
ast.target: 启用控制台调试日志。用于故障排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display estimated token usage in the agent view (for debugging purposes).
ast.target: 在代理视图中显示估计的令牌使用量（用于调试目的）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stop agent execution when a tool call fails. If disabled, the agent will continue executing subsequent tools.
ast.target: 当工具调用失败时停止代理执行。如果禁用，代理将继续执行后续工具。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the AI model for this session
ast.target: 为此会话选择 AI 模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 控制随机性（0 = 确定性，2 = 非常有创意）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Nucleus sampling threshold (0 = only top token, 1 = all tokens)
ast.target: 核采样阈值（0 = 仅顶部令牌，1 = 所有令牌）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a custom prompt template for this session
ast.target: 为此会话选择自定义提示词模板

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: description
ast.source: Streaming, diff view, scheduler catch-up, and personalization options that affect how you interact with the plugin.
ast.target: 流式传输、差异视图、调度器追赶以及影响您与插件交互方式的个性化选项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When inherited, this task uses the plugin’s global tool policy.
ast.target: 继承时，此任务将使用插件的全局工具策略。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When inherited, this hook uses the plugin’s global tool policy.
ast.target: 继承时，此钩子将使用插件的全局工具策略。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Run AI agent tasks automatically — on a schedule, or in response to vault events (file created/modified/deleted/renamed).
ast.target: 自动运行 AI 代理任务 — 按计划运行，或响应知识库事件（文件创建/修改/删除/重命名）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tune how the agent talks to the model: custom prompts, retry/generation parameters, conversation summarization, and loop guards.
ast.target: 调整代理与模型的对话方式：自定义提示、重试/生成参数、对话摘要和循环防护。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Control which agent tools require confirmation, run automatically, or are blocked entirely.
ast.target: 控制哪些代理工具需要确认、自动运行或完全阻止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Connect external Model Context Protocol servers to extend the agent with additional tools.
ast.target: 连接外部模型上下文协议服务器，以使用额外工具扩展代理功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Semantic search across your vault using Google File Search. Powers retrieval-augmented agent responses. Privacy: indexed files are uploaded to Google Cloud.
ast.target: 使用 Google 文件搜索在您的知识库中进行语义搜索。为检索增强的代理响应提供支持。隐私：索引文件将上传至 Google Cloud。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Diagnostic toggles for troubleshooting plugin behavior.
ast.target: 用于故障排除插件行为的诊断开关。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the file to write

ast.name: description
ast.source: Content to write to the file

ast.name: description
ast.source: A brief human-readable summary of the changes being made
ast.target: 对所做更改的简要可读摘要

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the directory to list (empty string for root)
ast.target: 要列出的目录路径（空字符串表示根目录）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path of the folder to create

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path of the file or folder to delete
ast.target: 要删除的文件或文件夹路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Current path of the file or folder to move
ast.target: 要移动的文件或文件夹的当前路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: New path for the file or folder (including filename for files)
ast.target: 文件或文件夹的新路径（对于文件，需包含文件名）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search pattern (supports wildcards: * matches any characters, ? matches single character)
ast.target: 搜索模式（支持通配符：* 匹配任意字符，? 匹配单个字符）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of results to return

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text or regex pattern to search for within file contents
ast.target: 要在文件内容中搜索的文本或正则表达式模式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether search should be case-sensitive (default: false)
ast.target: 搜索是否区分大小写（默认：false）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether to treat query as a regular expression (default: false). When false, searches for literal text.
ast.target: 是否将查询视为正则表达式（默认：false）。为 false 时，搜索字面文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of files with matches to return (default: 50)
ast.target: 要返回的匹配文件的最大数量（默认：50）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of lines before and after each match to include for context (default: 2, max: 5)
ast.target: 每个匹配项前后要包含的上下文行数（默认：2，最大：5）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the file relative to vault root (e.g., "folder/note.md", "folder/note", or "note"). Extension is optional.
ast.target: 相对于知识库根目录的文件路径（例如 \"folder/note.md\"、\"folder/note\" 或 \"note\"）。扩展名可选。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text content to append (automatically adds newline if needed)
ast.target: 要追加的文本内容（如需要会自动添加换行符）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The search query to send to Google
ast.target: 要发送给 Google 的搜索查询

ast.name: description
ast.source: The URL to fetch and analyze

ast.name: description
ast.source: What information to extract or questions to answer about the content
ast.target: 要提取的信息或关于内容要回答的问题

ast.name: description
ast.source: Research scope: vault_only (your notes), web_only (internet), or both (default)
ast.target: 研究范围：vault_only（您的笔记）、web_only（互联网）或 both（默认）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path for the output report file (optional). When background=true, the report is written here when complete — provide this so you know where to read the result.
ast.target: 输出报告文件的路径（可选）。当 background=true 时，报告完成后将写入此处 — 请提供此路径以便您知道在哪里读取结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When true, submit as a background task and return immediately with { taskId, output_file }. Use this when research is one step in a larger plan and you want to continue other work in parallel. Read the result later with read_file once the task completes.
ast.target: 为 true 时，作为后台任务提交，并立即返回 { taskId, output_file }。当研究是更大计划中的一个步骤，并且您希望并行继续其他工作时使用此选项。任务完成后，使用 read_file 读取结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The information to remember. Should be clear, concise Markdown text that will be appended to AGENTS.md.
ast.target: 要记住的信息。应为清晰、简洁的 Markdown 文本，将追加到 AGENTS.md。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Detailed description of the image to generate
ast.target: 要生成的图像的详细描述

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional: Explicit vault path where the generated image file should be saved (e.g. "attachments/my-image.png"). When omitted, the image is saved under the plugin's Background-Tasks folder.
ast.target: 可选：生成的图像文件应保存的显式知识库路径（例如 \"attachments/my-image.png\"）。省略时，图像将保存在插件的 Background-Tasks 文件夹下。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When true, submit as a background task and return immediately with { taskId, output_path }. The output_path in the response is the exact vault location where the image will be saved — pass it to read_file once the task completes.
ast.target: 为 true 时，作为后台任务提交，并立即返回 { taskId, output_path }。响应中的 output_path 是图像将保存的确切知识库位置 — 任务完成后将其传递给 read_file。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name of the skill to activate (e.g., "code-review", "data-analysis")
ast.target: 要激活的技能名称（例如 \"code-review\"、\"data-analysis\"）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional path to a specific resource file within the skill directory, relative to the skill root (e.g., "references/REFERENCE.md", "assets/template.hbs"). If omitted, returns the full SKILL.md body content.
ast.target: 可选：技能目录内特定资源文件的路径，相对于技能根目录（例如 \"references/REFERENCE.md\"、\"assets/template.hbs\"）。如果省略，则返回完整的 SKILL.md 正文内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name of the skill (1-64 chars, lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens only, e.g., "code-review", "meeting-notes")
ast.target: 技能名称（1-64 个字符，仅限小写字母数字和连字符，例如 \"code-review\"、\"meeting-notes\"）

ast.name: description
ast.source: A description of what this skill does and when to use it. Should include keywords that help identify relevant tasks.
ast.target: 此技能的功能描述及使用时机。应包含有助于识别相关任务的关键词。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The full markdown body content of the SKILL.md file. Should include step-by-step instructions, examples, and edge cases.
ast.target: SKILL.md 文件的完整 Markdown 正文内容。应包含分步说明、示例和边缘情况。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name of the skill to edit (e.g., "code-review", "data-analysis")
ast.target: 要编辑的技能名称（例如 \"code-review\"、\"data-analysis\"）

ast.name: description
ast.source: New description for the skill. If omitted, the existing description is preserved.
ast.target: 技能的新描述。如果省略，则保留现有描述。

ast.name: description
ast.source: New full markdown body content for the SKILL.md file. If omitted, the existing content is preserved.
ast.target: SKILL.md 文件的新完整 Markdown 正文内容。如果省略，则保留现有内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search term to match against session titles (case-insensitive substring match)
ast.target: 用于匹配会话标题的搜索词（不区分大小写的子字符串匹配）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find sessions that accessed this file path (e.g., "notes/meeting.md")
ast.target: 查找访问过此文件路径的会话（例如 \"notes/meeting.md\"）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find sessions linked to this project (matches project name or file path)
ast.target: 查找与此项目关联的会话（匹配项目名称或文件路径）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)
ast.target: 要返回的最大结果数（默认值：10）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Meta-schema for $data reference (JSON AnySchema extension proposal)
ast.target: $data 引用的元模式（JSON AnySchema 扩展提案）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The search query. Can be a question, topic, or concept to search for.
ast.target: 搜索查询。可以是问题、主题或要搜索的概念。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of results to return (default: 5, max: 20)
ast.target: 要返回的最大结果数（默认值：5，最大值：20）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit search to files in this folder path (e.g., "projects" or "projects/2024")
ast.target: 将搜索限制在此文件夹路径中的文件（例如 \"projects\" 或 \"projects/2024\"）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter by tags. Multiple tags use OR logic (matches any tag).
ast.target: 按标签筛选。多个标签使用 OR 逻辑（匹配任意标签）。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 未配置 Google API 密钥

ast.name: error
ast.source: Only HTTP and HTTPS URLs are supported
ast.target: 仅支持 HTTP 和 HTTPS URL

ast.name: error
ast.source: No response generated from URL content
ast.target: 未从 URL 内容生成响应

ast.name: error
ast.source: No analysis generated from page content
ast.target: 未从页面内容生成分析结果

ast.name: error
ast.source: Topic is required and must be a non-empty string
ast.target: 主题是必需的，且必须是非空字符串

ast.name: error
ast.target: 后台任务管理器不可用

ast.name: error
ast.source: Content is required and must be a non-empty string
ast.target: 内容是必需的，且必须是非空字符串

ast.name: error
ast.source: Prompt is required and must be a non-empty string
ast.target: 提示词是必需的，且必须是非空字符串

ast.name: error
ast.target: 技能管理器服务不可用

ast.name: error
ast.source: Skill name is required and must be a non-empty string
ast.target: 技能名称是必需的，且必须是非空字符串

ast.name: error
ast.source: Skill description is required and must be a non-empty string
ast.target: 技能描述是必需的，且必须是非空字符串

ast.name: error
ast.source: Skill content is required and must be a non-empty string
ast.target: 技能内容是必需的，且必须是非空字符串

ast.name: error
ast.source: At least one of description or content must be provided
ast.target: 必须提供描述或内容中的至少一项

ast.name: error
ast.source: Skill name must not contain consecutive hyphens (--)
ast.target: 技能名称不得包含连续的连字符（--）

ast.name: error
ast.source: Skill name must contain only lowercase alphanumeric characters and hyphens, and must not start or end with a hyphen
ast.target: 技能名称只能包含小写字母数字字符和连字符，且不得以连字符开头或结尾

ast.name: error
ast.source: Query is required and must be a non-empty string
ast.target: 查询是必需的，且必须是非空字符串

ast.name: error
ast.source: RAG indexing is not enabled. Enable it in settings to use semantic search.
ast.target: 未启用 RAG 索引。请在设置中启用它以使用语义搜索。

ast.name: error
ast.source: RAG indexing service is not ready. Please wait for initialization to complete.
ast.target: RAG 索引服务尚未就绪。请等待初始化完成。

ast.name: error
ast.source: No File Search Store configured. Please reindex your vault.
ast.target: 未配置文件搜索存储。请重新索引您的保险库。

ast.name: error
ast.source: RAG API client not available. Please wait for service initialization.
ast.target: RAG API 客户端不可用。请等待服务初始化。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Fires when a file is saved.

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Fires when a new file appears.

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Fires after a file is removed.

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Run a headless agent session with the prompt body.
ast.target: 使用提示正文运行无头代理会话。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Run the summary feature against the triggering file.
ast.target: 对触发文件运行摘要功能。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Rewrite the entire triggering file using the prompt body as the instruction.
ast.target: 使用提示正文作为指令重写整个触发文件。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Execute a registered command palette command by id.
ast.target: 通过 ID 执行已注册的命令面板命令。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Use read_file on historyPath to see the full conversation from a past session.
ast.target: 对 historyPath 使用 read_file 以查看过去会话的完整对话。

ast.name: label
ast.target: Gemini 3.1 Pro 预览版自定义工具

ast.name: message
ast.source: AGENTS.md does not exist yet. Use update_memory to create it.
ast.target: AGENTS.md 尚不存在。请使用 update_memory 来创建它。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的 Base64 字符串

ast.name: message
ast.source: must be equal to one of the allowed values

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match a schema in anyOf
ast.target: 必须匹配 anyOf 中的某个模式

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match exactly one schema in oneOf
ast.target: 必须精确匹配 oneOf 中的一个模式

ast.name: message
ast.source: URL cannot use javascript:, data:, or vbscript: scheme
ast.target: URL 不能使用 javascript:、data: 或 vbscript: 协议

ast.name: name
ast.target: 使用 AI 重写文本

ast.name: name
ast.target: 使用 AI 解释选中内容

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将项目链接到代理会话

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 例如，总结 {{filePath}} 中的更改。

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Enter a name for your custom prompt...
ast.target: 为您的自定义提示输入名称...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: What would you like to know about this text?
ast.target: 您想了解关于这段文本的什么？

ast.name: text
ast.target: 继承全局插件工具策略

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enable "Lifecycle hooks" in plugin settings before any hook can fire. You can still create definitions here while disabled — they will not run until you turn the feature on.
ast.target: 在插件设置中启用“生命周期钩子”后，任何钩子才能触发。您仍可在此处创建定义——它们在您启用该功能之前不会运行。

ast.name: text
ast.source: YOLO Mode allows the AI agent to execute all tools without any confirmation — including creating, editing, deleting, and moving files, as well as external API calls.
ast.target: YOLO 模式允许 AI 代理无需任何确认即可执行所有工具——包括创建、编辑、删除和移动文件，以及外部 API 调用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ This grants the AI full, unsupervised access to your vault and external services. There is no undo for destructive operations.
ast.target: ⚠️ 这将授予 AI 对您的保险库和外部服务的完全、无监督的访问权限。破坏性操作无法撤销。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Only enable this if you fully trust the AI model and understand the potential consequences.
ast.target: 仅在您完全信任 AI 模型并理解潜在后果时才启用此选项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: These tools were discovered on the server. Manage their permissions in the Tool Permissions settings.
ast.target: 这些工具是在服务器上发现的。请在工具权限设置中管理它们的权限。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No MCP servers configured. Click "Add Server" to get started.
ast.target: 未配置 MCP 服务器。点击“添加服务器”开始使用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your vault index is stored in Google Cloud. Do you want to delete it?
ast.target: 您的保险库索引存储在 Google Cloud 中。您确定要删除吗？

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you keep the data, re-enabling will be faster.
ast.target: 如果您保留数据，重新启用将会更快。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ If you delete, this action is permanent and cannot be undone. All indexed data will be permanently removed from Google Cloud, and you'll need to reindex all files.
ast.target: ⚠️ 如果您删除，此操作是永久性的，无法撤销。所有已索引的数据将从 Google Cloud 中永久移除，您需要重新索引所有文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ Privacy Notice: Enabling this feature uploads your vault files to Google Cloud for semantic search. Files are processed and stored by Google. Consider excluding folders with sensitive information.
ast.target: ⚠️ 隐私声明：启用此功能会将您的保险库文件上传到 Google Cloud 以进行语义搜索。文件由 Google 处理和存储。请考虑排除包含敏感信息的文件夹。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Search and read files in your vault
ast.target: 搜索并读取保险库中的文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Search the web and fetch information

ast.name: text
ast.target: 查找所有标记为 #important 的笔记

ast.target: 创建我的会议笔记每周摘要

ast.name: text
ast.source: Research productivity methods and create notes

ast.source: Organize my research notes by topic
ast.target: 按主题组织我的研究笔记

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your AI assistant that can actively work with your vault.
ast.target: 您的 AI 助手，可以主动处理您的保险库。

ast.name: text

ast.name: text
ast.target: 使用默认的保险库范围

ast.name: text
ast.source: No projects found. Create a note with the gemini-scribe/project tag to get started.
ast.target: 未找到项目。创建一个带有 gemini-scribe/project 标签的笔记即可开始。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No sessions match the selected filter
ast.target: 没有会话匹配所选筛选条件

ast.name: text
ast.source: These settings override the global defaults for this session only. Changes are saved automatically.
ast.target: 这些设置仅覆盖此会话的全局默认值。更改会自动保存。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Thank you for using Gemini Scribe! This update includes improvements and bug fixes.
ast.target: 感谢您使用 Gemini Scribe！本次更新包含改进和错误修复。

ast.name: text
ast.source: I understand. I have the context from the conversation summary above and will continue the conversation based on that context.
ast.target: 我明白了。我已从上面的对话摘要中获取了上下文，并将基于该上下文继续对话。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 正在为 AGENTS.md 生成上下文...

ast.name: text
ast.target: 没有文件匹配您的搜索

ast.name: text
ast.source: A previous indexing operation was interrupted. Would you like to resume or start fresh?
ast.target: 之前的索引操作被中断。您希望恢复还是重新开始？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Resume will continue from where you left off, skipping already-indexed files.
ast.target: 恢复将从您中断的地方继续，跳过已索引的文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The following tasks were scheduled to run while Obsidian was closed. Choose which ones to run now.
ast.target: 以下任务计划在 Obsidian 关闭时运行。选择现在要运行哪些。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 后台任务管理器不可用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No background tasks yet. Long-running operations like deep research and image generation will appear here.
ast.target: 暂无后台任务。深度研究和图像生成等长时间运行的操作将显示在此处。

ast.name: text
ast.source: RAG indexing is not enabled. Enable it in Settings → Gemini Scribe.
ast.target: RAG 索引未启用。请在设置 → Gemini Scribe 中启用它。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 计划任务管理器不可用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No scheduled tasks found. Create a markdown file in the Scheduled-Tasks folder to get started.
ast.target: 未找到计划任务。在 Scheduled-Tasks 文件夹中创建一个 Markdown 文件以开始使用。
